setup.note: Microsoft Work IQ OneDrive remote MCP server, currently preview. Manages files and folders in the authenticated user's personal OneDrive; official docs note file operations are limited to 5 MB or less. Requires Microsoft 365 Copilot license, tenant admin enablement/consent, tenant ID, and Entra OAuth client. Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-agent-365/mcp-server-reference/onedrive

inputs.label: Microsoft Entra OAuth Client
inputs.description: Client ID, and optionally client secret, for the Microsoft Entra app registration.
